summary: Hierarchical Auth System tested successfully. All 23 backend tests passed. UI verification confirmed all new Admin Panel features (3 tabs, Created By column, Hierarchy view, Impersonation, Access Control multi-select with Save). Fixed one backend bug where permissions could be None when creating users.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1, -1) - charts render fine but show warning

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in auth.py: role_config.get('permissions') could return None when role_config exists but permissions field is None - now falls back to DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS
Hierarchical user management properly tracks parent_id and created_by
Super Admin can impersonate any non-super-admin user
Admin only sees their children (not all users)
Admin can only create Advertiser/User accounts (not Admin/Super Admin)
Bulk access update endpoint properly updates all users with selected role
seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests are cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hierarchical auth system fully functional. Test users for Demo Admin's children exist in database.

admin_panel_three_tabs.description: Admin Panel has 3 tabs: Users, Hierarchy, Access Control (Super Admin only)
admin_panel_three_tabs.evidence: Screenshot shows Users, Hierarchy, Access Control tabs

users_tab_created_by_column.description: Users tab shows 'Created By' column to track hierarchy
users_tab_created_by_column.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Created By' column with values like 'System', 'Demo Admin', 'Super Admin'

hierarchy_tab_expandable.description: Hierarchy tab shows admins with expandable list of their team members
hierarchy_tab_expandable.evidence: Screenshot shows Demo Admin with '4 team members' badge, expanded to show child users

impersonation_feature.description: Super Admin can impersonate other users via login icon in Actions column
impersonation_feature.evidence: Backend test confirms impersonation creates valid token, UI shows impersonate button and redirects after click

access_control_multiselect_grid.description: Access Control tab has properly aligned multi-select grid for sidebar items and permissions
access_control_multiselect_grid.evidence: Screenshot shows 5-column grid with checkboxes for sidebar items and permissions

save_changes_button.description: Save Changes button appears when changes are made (enabled state with green color)
save_changes_button.evidence: Screenshot shows Save Changes button with green bg-[#10B981] after checkbox toggle

unsaved_changes_warning.description: Warning banner appears when there are unsaved changes
unsaved_changes_warning.evidence: Screenshot shows 'You have unsaved changes. Click "Save Changes" to apply them to all users with this role.'

bulk_save_updates_all_users.description: Bulk save updates all users with the selected role
bulk_save_updates_all_users.evidence: Backend test confirms bulk update endpoint returns users_updated count

admin_can_only_create_advertiser_user.description: Admin can only create Advertiser or User accounts (not Admin/Super Admin)
admin_can_only_create_advertiser_user.evidence: Backend tests confirm 403 for admin trying to create admin/super_admin, UI shows 'As Admin, you can create Advertiser or User accounts'

superadmin_can_create_any_role.description: Super Admin can create any role including Admin
superadmin_can_create_any_role.evidence: Backend test confirms super admin can create admin accounts

admin_sees_only_own_children.description: Admin only sees users they created (their children)
admin_sees_only_own_children.evidence: Admin Panel shows 'My Team' with 4 users (all with 'Demo Admin' as Created By)

admin_no_hierarchy_access_tab.description: Admin does NOT see Hierarchy and Access Control tabs
admin_no_hierarchy_access_tab.evidence: Screenshot shows only Users tab when logged in as Admin

admin_cannot_impersonate.evidence: Backend test confirms 403 when admin tries to impersonate, no impersonate buttons visible in Admin's UI

bug_fixed.issue: When creating user, if role_config exists but permissions field is None, the code would pass None to UserResponse causing pydantic validation error
bug_fixed.fix: Changed conditional to check if role_config AND role_config.get('permissions') before using it, otherwise fallback to DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS
